description: Used em-dashes in drafted email for David. VOICE.md explicitly states 'No em-dashes (use hyphens)'. This has been corrected before.
correction: Use hyphens, never em-dashes, in all email drafts for David.
systemic_fix: Re-enforce: every email draft must be checked against VOICE.md email conventions before presenting. Em-dash rule is non-negotiable.
